title: Camping Bites? Try 9 Herbal Creams for Relief
description: Hypericum perforatum creams, also known as St. John's Wort creams, contain properties and constituents that help with insect bites. The creams are rich in hyperforin and hypericin, which are natural anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and itching. They also have antiseptic and antihistamine properties, which help to soothe and calm the affected area. When you apply the cream to an insect bite, it helps to reduce the redness and swelling, and the itching and discomfort asso...
